title: Hopiumﾃ｢竄ｬ邃｢s New S++ﾃつｮ Plate Boosts Hydrogen Fuel Cell Performance for Heavy-Duty Transport
content: French hydrogen fuel cell innovator Hopium announced a key breakthroughﾃ｢竄ｬ窶掖he integration of its new S++ﾃつｮ plate into its 100 kW fuel cell stack. This innovation enhances electrical efficiency and current distribution while reducing weight, making it ideal for sectors like logistics, aviation, and marine shipping. Despite being under financial receivership, Hopium is pushing ahead with road trials scheduled for autumn 2025. The move represents a significant step toward industrial decarbonization, aligning with global efforts to cut emissions and shift to cleaner energy systems. The industry now awaits crucial July test results, which could shape the future of hydrogen mobility.
author: Analysts Account
